creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Mar 22, 2011 at 3:32 AM, Maxim Sobolev <sobomax@sippysoft.com> wrote:
 > On 3/21/2011 3:54 AM, Florian Smeets wrote:
 >>
 >> you are missing the codec-negotioation patch, that's the reason why i
 >> did not update net/asterisk14. I tried to update the patch to 1.4.39 but
 >> i failed.
 >>
 >> Just dropping it did not seem appropriate to me. I know the situation is
 >> bad, either dropping functionality or staying with a vulnerable version.
 
 Florian,
 Thanks for pointing it out.
 I forgot to check my patch when CODEC_PATCH option is on.
 I understand asterisk14 stays 1.4.37 because of the avobe reason.
 
 > I have update here, I will do it today.
 
 Maxim,
 It is good news for us.
 
 Regards,
 
 -- 
 TAKATSU Tomonari
